sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْنَا إِلَى مَحَطَّةِ الْقِطَارِ لِلسَّفَرِ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Otišli smo na željezničku stanicu kako bismo otputovali u drugi grad.
sentences.translationEn: We went to the train station to travel to another city.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْنَا التَّذَاكِرَ مِنْ آلَةِ الْبَيْعِ الذَّاتِيِّ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Karte smo lako kupili na automatu za prodaju.
sentences.translationEn: We bought the tickets from the vending machine easily.

sentences.arabic: انْطَلَقَ الْقِطَارُ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ دُونَ أَيِّ تَأْخِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Voz je krenuo u zakazano vrijeme bez ikakvog kašnjenja.
sentences.translationEn: The train departed at the scheduled time without any delay.

sentences.arabic: شَاهَدْنَا الْمَنَاظِرَ الطَّبِيعِيَّةَ الْخَلَّابَةَ مِنَ النَّافِذَةِ خِلَالَ الرِّحْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Gledali smo prelijepe prirodne pejzaže kroz prozor tokom putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: We saw the stunning natural scenery from the window during the trip.

sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ النَّاسِ التَّنَقُّلَ بِالْقِطَارِ لِأَنَّهُ سَرِيعٌ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi radije putuju vozom jer je brz.
sentences.translationEn: Many people prefer moving by train because it is fast.
